description: Weather app showing metric and imperial units side by side in 8 languages maripànaTokana (Malagasy for "a single thermometer") is a phone-only weather app that displays current conditions, hourly forecasts, and a 10-day outlook. Key Features: • Real-time weather from Open-Meteo (no API key needed) • Dual-unit display: metric and imperial shown simultaneously • Tap any value to swap primary/secondary units • 8 languages: Malagasy, Arabic, English, Spanish, French, Hindi, Nepali, Chinese • Tap the flag icon at the bottom right to switch language • 22 font pairings for customization • Native digit rendering (Arabic, Hindi, Nepali) • RTL support for Arabic • Two home screen widgets (compact 4x1, detailed 4x2) • GPS location with cached and fresh strategies • Auto-refresh when data is stale • Pull-to-refresh support Weather Information: • Temperature with feels-like and min/max • Pressure, humidity with dew point • Wind speed and direction with cardinal compass • UV index • Precipitation (rain/snow) • Visibility • Sunrise/sunset times Privacy: • No ads, no tracking • Location used only for weather data • No personal data collected • Open source (MIT License)
